title: Design CodeWiki skill package and workflow assets
summary: Align CodeWiki skill docs with current KB: fixed 10 stale related-doc references across 8 skill files, reclassified Matt Pocock grill/plan/build/verify to CodeWiki feedback/documentation/implementation/validation, and updated TASK-034 spec_paths to existing KB docs.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki has a clear packaged skill contract that teaches agents how to operate `.codewiki/` without creating parallel documentation systems.
acceptance: A skill-package structure is specified for SKILL.md and workflow assets — exists and unchanged.
Skill router (codewiki) maps feedback/documentation/implementation/validation/research/architecture/view-audit to current compiler model.
All 10 stale related-doc references replaced: v2-operating-model.md → current KB paths per skill focus; compilers/feedback.md + compilers/documentation.md → compilers.md.

Matt Pocock grill/plan/build/verify terminology adopted as: grill→feedback compiler, plan→documentation compiler, build→implementation compiler, verify→validation gateway. Adapted to CodeWiki's compiler/build/lint/validation semantics. Discarded as-is because CodeWiki already has its own knowledge/roadmap/graph model.
Repo-specific process customization lives under .codewiki/kb/** or config; package workflow assets remain versioned and not casually self-mutated.
non_goals: Do not blindly copy `CONTEXT.md`, `docs/adr`, issue-tracker, or PRD conventions when they duplicate CodeWiki knowledge/roadmap semantics.
Do not make agents hand-edit generated views.
verification: Review packaged skill docs against `.codewiki/` invariants.
Run package smoke/test checks after any skill packaging changes.
Verify no parallel source of truth was introduced.

delta.desired: Skill files reference current KB paths; terminology matches compiler/build/validation/lexicon semantics; Matt Pocock adaptation decision documented.
delta.current: All 8 skill files updated with current KB paths and 2026-05-10 dates. Zero stale references. Terminology matches KB: feedback/documentation/implementation not grill/plan/build.
delta.closure: Skill files aligned with KB; TASK-034 spec_paths updated; acceptance criteria met.
